task_description: Build a DSA Spaced Repetition Tracker website as a static SPA (vanilla HTML/CSS/JS) that helps a user track revision scheduling for Neetcode 150 questions. Uses spaced repetition with Ebbinghaus forgetting curve intervals, respects a 3-hour daily time budget, and provides a daily dashboard showing what to review.

verification.summary: Static SPA - no build step. All 150 questions verified, 18 categories present, no external URLs, JS logic validated via code review. Spaced repetition engine correctly implements interval adjustments. Scheduler enforces 180-min budget with proper priority ordering.
